title: lonchocarpus cochleatus
intro: Lonchocarpus cochleatus, also known as the 'tortoise shell bean', is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat a range of health issues. The medicinal properties of Lonchocarpus cochleatus include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Lonchocarpus cochleatus include tea infusions and decoctions, which can be administered orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
